title: Quantum Quotient 3.0
subtitle: The ultimate optics and photonics quiz challenge.
description: Get ready for the next edition of Quantum Quotient—a thrilling quizzing competition designed to test your expertise in optics and photonics. This high-energy, fast-paced challenge pushes the boundaries by testing not just your knowledge, but your ability to apply it under pressure. 30 questions, 30 minutes—do you have what it takes?
highlights: Recognition and rewards for top scorers

timeline.description: Last date to register for the competition
Main quiz competition with 30 MCQs in 30 minutes

rules: No external resources, calculators, or internet searches allowed during the quiz
30 questions to be completed in 30 minutes
Winners determined by accuracy and speed
eligibility: Students from Arts, Commerce, Sciences backgrounds
Open to all interested in optics and photonics
